# `vr` CLI reference

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/gen_cli_docs.py — never hand-edit.
     Regenerate with: python3 scripts/gen_cli_docs.py -->

Generated from vrcli 0.1.0.

## `vr`

```
Usage: vr [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  CLI for the Rapid7-hosted Velociraptor REST API.

  Configuration is environment-only: R7_VR_API_KEY (or R7_VR_API_KEY_FILE), R7_VR_REGION,
  R7_VR_ORG_ID. There is no --api-key flag by design.

Options:
  --version              Show the version and exit.
  --output [json|table]  Output format. stdout is one JSON document by default; table is for humans.
                         [default: json]
  --verbose              Debug logging on stderr (always redacted).
  --help                 Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  artifacts  Inspect and manage artifact definitions.
  clients    Manage and inspect enrolled clients.
  flows      Create and manage per-client collections.
  hunts      Create and manage fleet-wide hunts.
  labels     Manage client labels.
  ops        Composite SOAR operations (triage, live response, IOC hunts, containment).
  status     Auth + connectivity smoke test (one cheap GET).
```

### `vr artifacts`

```
Usage: vr artifacts [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Inspect and manage artifact definitions.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

### `vr clients`

```
Usage: vr clients [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Manage and inspect enrolled clients.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  delete   Delete a client from the organization.
  get      Get one client (accepts a client ID or hostname).
  list     List clients.
  resolve  Resolve a hostname to its client record (errors on 0 or >1 matches).
  update   Update client metadata.
```

#### `vr clients delete`

```
Usage: vr clients delete [OPTIONS] CLIENT_ID

  Delete a client from the organization.

Options:
  --yes      Confirm this destructive action (required; there is no interactive prompt).
  --dry-run  Print the exact API request without sending it.
  --help     Show this message and exit.
```

#### `vr clients get`

```
Usage: vr clients get [OPTIONS] CLIENT_ID

  Get one client (accepts a client ID or hostname).

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

#### `vr clients list`

```
Usage: vr clients list [OPTIONS]

  List clients.

Options:
  --hostname TEXT                Filter by hostname substring.
  --os TEXT                      Filter by operating system.
  --label TEXT                   Filter by label.
  --status [online|offline|all]  Filter by online status.
  --limit INTEGER RANGE          Maximum results to return.  [x>=1]
  --all                          Follow cursors and fetch every page.
  --page-budget INTEGER RANGE    Maximum pages to fetch with --all.  [default: 100; x>=1]
  --help                         Show this message and exit.
```

#### `vr clients resolve`

```
Usage: vr clients resolve [OPTIONS] HOSTNAME

  Resolve a hostname to its client record (errors on 0 or >1 matches).

Options:
  --first  On multiple matches, take the first instead of erroring.
  --help   Show this message and exit.
```

#### `vr clients update`

```
Usage: vr clients update [OPTIONS] CLIENT_ID

  Update client metadata.

Options:
  --add KEY=VALUE  Metadata key to set.
  --remove KEY     Metadata key to remove.
  --dry-run        Print the exact API request without sending it.
  --help           Show this message and exit.
```

```
Usage: vr flows [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Create and manage per-client collections.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

```

```

```
Usage: vr ops [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Composite SOAR operations (triage, live response, IOC hunts, containment).

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

### `vr status`

```
Usage: vr status [OPTIONS]

  Auth + connectivity smoke test (one cheap GET). SOAR health check.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```
